headline: Sundae: Plan. Prep. Hit Macros.
subtitle: Weekly meal plans built for lifters
shortBlurb: Plan once on Sunday, eat right all week. Sundae builds a macro-targeted 7-day plan, an aisle-sorted grocery list, and a step-by-step prep day schedule.
featureBullets: 7-day meal plan tuned to your macros
Auto grocery list grouped by aisle
Pantry tracking subtracts what you own
Sunday prep day, batched in order
Scalable servings with live macro totals

screenshots.headline: Plan once. Eat right all week.
screenshots.subheadline: Macros, groceries, and prep day in one ritual

screenshots.headline: Hit your numbers every day.
screenshots.subheadline: Daily kcal and macros at a glance

screenshots.headline: A 7-day plan that adds up.
screenshots.subheadline: Swap any meal. Macros rebalance instantly.
